name: Nanjing Huamai Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Huamai Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and sale of telecom distribution products and passive microwave products in China. The company offers fiber optic cables, FTTH solutions, MDAS systems, MDAS systems, smart home solutions, data center solutions, and other products. In addition, Nanjing Huamai Technology Co., Ltd. exports its products to approximately 50 countries and regions. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Nanjing, China.
